If tonight’s news is true, Michigan’s 1931 state law banning abortion would snap back into effect, making any abortion illegal in our state — even if the mom will die, or if she was raped by a family member. No exceptions. 1/2
My poor mother is turning over in her grave. The House has already voted to codify Roe — let all Senators be on record on this one in an up or down vote. 2/2

A big thanks to the supporters and volunteers who are turning out for early voting. I’m grateful for your time and your vote. Let’s start a new chapter in representation for WNC in DC! #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/BJkOypTZlN

Local elections matter. New Mexico’s archaic anti-abortion laws were overturned by electing pro-choice state lawmakers. If SCOTUS overturns Roe v. Wade, we must continue to organize and elect pro-choice state lawmakers nationwide.

After law school, I had offers to work on Wall Street. I chose a different path and went to work for low-income kids who needed access to healthcare. Wall Street doesn’t need another vote in Congress. But working families do.

text:
Happy Filing Week! I’m *officially* a candidate for WA State Senate y’all 🙌🏾

Super grateful to my family for coming with me to Olympia today & for my community for going on this journey with me. 

Who’s ready for 4 more years of working to make lives better for everyday folks? https://t.co/zMZad2sda9
למה אוקספורד כל כך יפה? https://t.co/KZTeiSyz7E

Today, I announced I am running in #NY19, as currently drawn. This will be one of the most competitive seats on the map in 2022. To hold the House we must win in Upstate New York. 

I have 45,000 followers. Can you help us get to 50,000 today?

REMINDER: Today is the day! Polls are open from 6:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m. I would be honored to earn your vote to bring conservative leadership, experience and dignity back to #NC11. Thanks to all of you who have already allowed me to earn your vote and your trust. #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/K0nOjur2Wo

Iran is a country ready to explode. Westerners haven’t noticed, but popular anger against the regime is sky high. The violent scenes coming through are astonishing. People want to tear the regime limb from limb. No one can say when it will happen, but any event could trigger it.

Sgt. Erick Estrada of the Texas Dept of Public Safety tells @andersoncooper the shooter crashed his car near the school, got out with a gun and wearing body armor, was engaged by law enforcement, but made his way into the school anyway and went classroom to classroom shooting.

I hope all of you who were able to attend #TalesOfTheJedi panel at #StarWarsCelebration enjoyed what you saw!  We really enjoyed making it with @dave_filoni at the helm.   That guy seems to know the #StarWars galaxy pretty well.
Almost time for some surprises at the #BadBatch panel tomorrow at #StarWarsCelebration.  Enjoy!

Last one for the night.  Go check out The Siege of Mandalore tomorrow at #StarWarsCelebration Getting to see it on the big screen is how it was always meant to be viewed if you get the chance.  Super proud of all the work that went into those final 4 episodes.

This weekend, I am thankful for all of America’s veterans, military families, and in particular, our brave servicemembers who gave their lives to defend our freedoms. #ncpol #wncpol #NC11 #MemorialDayWeekend https://t.co/QjrtP6KLCy
First look at our boys and gal in Season 2!  Plenty of fun this season for sure.  Hope you all enjoy it as much as we love making it!  #TheBadBatch #StarWars

I just wanted to say a huge THANK YOU to all the amazing Star Wars fans out there.  The love and appreciation you showed to our animation team throughout #StarWarsCelebration means so much to all of us.  We will do our best to continue to bring great stories to you all #StarWars

Today, we honor all of the brave members of our US Military, who gave their lives in the greatest sacrifice to keep us safe and protect our great country and freedoms. God bless you and your families. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol #MemorialDay https://t.co/HaBEa9ITYw

یادآوری همیشگی: "رژیم ایران" درست نیست، "رژیم در ایران" درست است.
هیچ چیز این رژیم روحانی که  کشور بزرگ ایران را به صورت غیرقانونی تصرف و به صورت غیرقانونی اشغال کرده است ایرانی نیست.
